free_text: Candidates for the 5alpha condensed state in 20Ne
Beam intensity is 10 nA.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is gas. (14.1 kPa and room
temperature)
- Target-thickness is 0.0896 mg/cm2. 8.0 mm cell along
the beam axis
RCNP
Grand Raiden
Silicon telescope
S.Shin
Received by e-mail from S.Adachi
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and alpha
No information on source of uncertainties
Plotted in Fig.3 of Phys. Lett. B 819 (2021)
